name: YAMADA PERFECT𖦹☆★
description: She was the exemplary student. Smart, straight A’s, pretty. only a girls dream. But as the years progressed, she was slowly teetering on the edge before falling to her death. That fateful day the teacher returned her exam, the dread she felt when she first saw a B+, Everything came crashing down.
creator: St4r_f@ce<3
